title: qrafty's Subtle Crosshair
description: This pack simply makes the crosshair less obstuctive with a clean modern look. 🏹
body:
# You want a sleeker Crosshair? 🏹
![BEFORE AND AFTER IMAGE OF CROSSHAIR](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed7245932a5c3ea51e5313c1de26814349216e1a_0.webp)
### qrafty's Subtle Crosshair delivers just that!
Featuring a smaller, and modern looking crosshair suitable for all use cases - including building dirt huts and destroying beds in a heavy PVP fight (in Minecraft). 🫐
![DISCORD INVITE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c857a8c1b5698669033c9d5b7d9b193795e6237.webp)

## [DISCORD INVITE](https://www.qrafty.net/discord)
